title: monticalia tolimensis
intro: Monticalia tolimensis, also known as Tolima's Monticalia or Monticalia, is a plant species in the daisy family native to the Andean region of South America. This plant is used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, such as constipation and bloating, due to its anthelmintic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Monticalia tolimensis include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce inflammation, and help manage stress and anxiety. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve infusions or teas made from its leaves, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
